title: Section 14E
content: 1[14E. Terms and conditions of service.-- The salary and allowances payable to and the other terms and conditions of service of the Chairperson and other Members of the Appellate Tribunal shall be such as may be prescribed: Provided that neither the salary and allowances nor the other terms and conditions of service of the Chairperson or a Member of the Appellate Tribunal shall be varied to his disadvantage after appointment.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 11, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 24-1-2000).
